title: The Loop Contagion
relevance_summary: Recursive stablecoin minting leading to liquidity crisis and significant funds loss

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints stablecoins using another stablecoin as collateral.

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that mints stablecoins using another stablecoin as collateral.
summary: Stream Finance and Elixir Network engaged in recursive stablecoin minting, leading to a liquidity crisis and significant funds loss. A guard could have detected and blocked such transactions by monitoring for stablecoin minting using another stablecoin as collateral.
